Instructions: Answer the following question about drug properties.
Context: SARS-CoV-2 is a coronavirus that causes the COVID-19 disease and has led to millions of deaths worldwide within a few years. Discovering new drugs that can inhibit viral replication would be useful for combatting the virus. One method is to screen a library of small molecule drugs for inhibition in an infected cell-based assay.
Question: Given a drug SMILES string, predict whether it
(A) does not inhibit SARS-CoV-2 replication (B) inhibits SARS-CoV-2 replication
Drug SMILES: CCN(CC)CCNC(=O)c1cc(Br)c(N)cc1OC
Please think step by step and use the relevant tools in your analysis. Then put your final choice ((A) or (B)) after "Answer:"
